Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: HMS Aurora
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
An ancient light cruiser design. Lightly armored for a capital ship, but more than enough for a rimworld settlement.

CE ammo usage:
Main guns: 152mm shell
Secondary guns: 102mm shell
Anti air guns: 40x158mmR, 20x128mm
Torpedo: 533mm

Vehicles.VehicleDef.label: HMS Aurora
Vehicles.VehicleDef.description: An ancient light cruiser design. Lightly armored for a capital ship, but more than enough for a rimworld settlement.

Vehicles.VehicleTurretDef.label: 6 inch turret
